title: Remaining API As-of Gap Closure — Audit

/api/stocks/[id]/history.note: Route is external proxy to TWSE. Added response-level date filter: gatedHistory = history.filter(row => row.date <= asOfDate). Cannot gate at source. asOfGateStatus, futureRowsExcluded, limitation included in response.
/api/stocks/[id]/history.mitigation: Response-level filter enforced. limitation field documents permanent constraint.

/api/stocks/backtest.note: Added asOfDate param to POST body and GET query. backtestFromDB and backtestFromDBRegimeAware now accept asOfDb and apply lte filter to stockQuote. asOfDate and asOfGateStatus included in response.

/api/backtest/validate.note: Added resolveAsOfDate import. Added asOfDate to body destructuring. stockQuote.findMany now has lte: asOfDb. asOfDate and asOfGateStatus in response.

/api/report/ops.note: Added asOfDate query param. Added asOfReadiness block with futureRowsDetected, futureRowsExcludedByGate, abnormalHistoricalRowsDetected, mvpUniverseTierSummary, readinessStatus.

StrategyScreenEngine.note: Passes asOf from ScreenParams to fuseBatch(batchSymbols, asOf).

SignalFusionEngine/fuseBatch.note: fuseSignals and fuseBatch accept asOf?. Passes asOf to analyzeStock.

RuleBasedStockAnalyzer.note: analyzeStock accepts asOf?. Gates stockQuote, institutionalChip with lte: asOfDb. Gates monthlyRevenue with year/month comparison.

InstitutionalChip query path.note: institutionalChip.findMany gated with date: { lte: asOfDb } in RuleBasedStockAnalyzer.

MarketIndex query path.note: MarketIndex is queried via MarketRegimeEngine / detectRegime() which is shared with T-09/T-10. Modifying it risks regression in existing suites. Documented as AUDIT_ONLY for P0-03. P0-04 to address.

remainingGaps: MarketIndex via MarketRegimeEngine — AUDIT_ONLY, defer to P0-04
